data.title: Target Hospitality Appoints Cyril Hahamski Chief Accounting Officer
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Target Hospitality ( (TH) ) has shared an announcement.

On January 12, 2026, Target Hospitality’s board appointed veteran finance executive Cyril J. Hahamski as Chief Accounting Officer, with Chief Financial Officer Jason Vlacich relinquishing his additional Chief Accounting Officer duties but remaining CFO. Hahamski brings more than 25 years of experience spanning public accounting and senior controllership roles at Anew Climate, ALS Limited and Buckeye Partners, and will oversee Target’s accounting operations, external reporting, internal controls and management reporting under an employment agreement running initially through December 31, 2027 that includes equity-based pay options and change-in-control protections. The move is designed to bolster Target’s internal financial and reporting capabilities as it pursues a robust pipeline of growth opportunities, signaling a further professionalization of its finance function that may support execution of its strategic expansion plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (TH) stock is a Buy with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Target Hospitality stock, see the TH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TH is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial resilience (strong free cash flow and very low leverage) and a constructive earnings outlook supported by sizable multiyear contract wins and reaffirmed revenue/EBITDA guidance. These positives are tempered by ongoing profitability challenges (net losses/negative margins) and a weak valuation signal from the negative P/E, with technical indicators showing only mixed-to-moderate momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on TH stock, click here.

More about Target Hospitality

Target Hospitality Corp., listed on Nasdaq under the ticker TH, is one of North America’s largest providers of vertically integrated modular accommodations and value-added hospitality services in the United States. The company builds, owns and operates a customized and expanding network of communities for a range of end users, offering a full suite of services including premium food service management, concierge, laundry, logistics, security and recreational facilities.

Average Trading Volume: 420,170

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $826.2M

data.title: Summit Minerals Launches Drone Aeromagnetic Survey at Keystone Project in Nevada
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Summit Minerals Limited ( (AU:SUM) ) has provided an announcement.

Summit Minerals has commenced a low-altitude UAV aeromagnetic survey at its recently acquired Keystone Project in northern Nevada, engaging Pioneer Exploration Consultants to fly 210 line-kilometres over the Keystone Main, Marble Rock and 599 prospects. The high‑resolution magnetic data, now being processed with results expected in about three weeks, will underpin the first significant exploration work at Keystone since mining ceased in 1943 and is intended to refine structural targets for a preliminary drilling campaign planned for early 2026, marking a key step in building a modern geological model and potentially revitalising this historic mining area.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SUM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Summit Minerals Limited stock, see the AU:SUM Stock Forecast page.

More about Summit Minerals Limited

Summit Minerals Limited is an ASX-listed mineral exploration company focused on discovering and developing metallic-sulphide and other mineral deposits. The company’s portfolio includes the Keystone Project in northern Nevada, USA, where it is targeting structurally controlled, vein-hosted mineralisation in an historically mined district.

Average Trading Volume: 418,409

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Solitron Devices Reports Strong Q3 Sales and Bookings Growth
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Solitron Devices ( (SODI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

For the fiscal third quarter ended November 30, 2025, Solitron Devices reported a 49% year-on-year rise in net sales to approximately $5.02 million and net income more than doubling to $0.65 million, or $0.31 per share, alongside a 73% surge in net bookings to $13.91 million and a 124% jump in backlog to $27.48 million, supported by a larger, higher-priced AMRAAM Lot 39 order and other substantial customer wins. Over the first nine months of fiscal 2026, net sales increased 7% to $11.71 million and bookings climbed 78% to $21.03 million, but net income fell sharply to $0.08 million from $0.87 million a year earlier as higher material and tariff costs and elevated SG&A—driven by stock-based compensation and non-cash charges—compressed profitability, even as the expanding backlog and active new product development efforts underscored growing demand and potential for future revenue growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (SODI) stock is a Hold with a $21.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Solitron Devices stock, see the SODI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SODI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SODI is a Neutral.

Solitron Devices’ overall stock score is driven by strong technical momentum and positive corporate events, offset by mixed financial performance and concerning valuation metrics. The record bookings highlight potential growth, but profitability and valuation concerns remain significant risks.

To see Spark’s full report on SODI stock, click here.

More about Solitron Devices

Solitron Devices, Inc., based in West Palm Beach, Florida, is a manufacturer of electronic components serving high-reliability and defense-related markets, with demand driven in part by programs such as AMRAAM and other defense systems. The company focuses on specialized, high-performance devices where long program lifecycles and booking visibility, reflected in its sizable backlog, are key to its market positioning.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Star Copper Extends Supergene Zone With Strong Phase 1 Drilling at B.C. Flagship
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Alpha Copper Corp ( (TSE:STCU) ).

Star Copper Corp. reported the remaining Phase 1 drill results from its 2025 summer program at the Star Project, highlighted by hole S-055, which intersected 311 metres grading 0.42% copper equivalent from near surface and further confirmed extensive hypogene and supergene copper-gold mineralization. The Phase 1 campaign successfully extended the near-surface supergene oxide footprint by 50 metres to the southwest to roughly 550m by 500m, refined the structural and alteration model around the Star Fault, and reinforced management’s view of significant scale potential in the 1km by 1km Cu-Au oxide zone ahead of Phase 2 results from Star Main, Copper Creek and Star North, positioning the project for possible resource growth and value creation in 2026.

More about Alpha Copper Corp

Star Copper Corp. is a critical minerals exploration and development company focused on copper and gold, with its flagship Star Project located in northwestern British Columbia. The company is targeting a large, nested porphyry system with both near-surface Cu-Au oxide and deeper hypogene mineralization, aiming to build on extensive historic work in a mineral-rich district.

Average Trading Volume: 71,822

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$65.64M

data.title: Oceania Healthcare Defers OCA010 Bond Interest Payment by One Day
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Oceania Healthcare ( (AU:OCA) ) is now available.

Oceania Healthcare has announced a minor administrative change to the upcoming interest payment on its secured fixed-rate OCA010 bonds, deferring the payment date from Monday, 19 January 2026, to the next business day, Tuesday, 20 January 2026. The adjustment is required because the original date falls on Wellington Anniversary Day, when banks in Wellington are generally closed, and is in line with the bond terms that stipulate interest is paid on the following business day, meaning investors will receive payment one day later without any change to the bond’s underlying conditions.

More about Oceania Healthcare

Oceania Healthcare Limited is a New Zealand-based aged care and retirement village operator, listed on both the NZX and ASX, providing residential care and retirement living services to older people across the country.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: AE Fuels Secures Full Ownership of South Woodie Woodie Manganese Project to Boost Battery-Grade Supply
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from AE Fuels Corporation ( (TSE:AEF) ) is now available.

AE Fuels Corporation has acquired 100% ownership of the South Woodie Woodie Manganese Project in Western Australia’s Pilbara district, completing its option agreement with Trek Metals by paying A$450,000 and issuing a total of 8 million shares. The project spans 517.5 square kilometres across nine exploration licences, hosts the Contact and Contact North deposits with an NI 43-101 inferred resource of 11.3 million tonnes at 15% manganese, and includes multiple high-grade prospects with grades reported above 40% Mn. AEF has already advanced key technical work, including metallurgical test programs and initial assessments of mining, processing and infrastructure, and is progressing a pre-feasibility study and environmental baseline studies to fast-track development of battery-grade HPMSM. The acquisition and ongoing technical de-risking reinforce AEF’s strategy to become a reliable supplier of high-purity manganese into North American battery and technology markets at a time of heightened geopolitical risk and supply chain concentration in critical minerals.

More about AE Fuels Corporation

AE Fuels Corporation is building a global battery minerals business focused on supplying high-purity manganese products, particularly High-Purity Manganese Sulphate Monohydrate (HPMSM), to North American battery and technology markets. Through its wholly owned subsidiary Advanced Energy Fuels, the company targets critical mineral supply chains for electric vehicles and energy storage systems, aiming to capitalize on high U.S. import reliance and growing demand for manganese-based battery chemistries.

Average Trading Volume: 60,855

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

See more insights into AEF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Royal Gold ( (RGLD) ).

Royal Gold reported consolidated stream segment sales of about 64,000 gold equivalent ounces for the fourth quarter of 2025, reflecting contributions from its long-standing RGLD Gold AG portfolio and the newly acquired Sandstorm Gold portfolio following the completion of that acquisition on October 20, 2025. The company also provided an update on its balance sheet and its ongoing efforts to rationalize non-core assets, signaling continued integration of Sandstorm’s streams and royalties and an emphasis on portfolio optimization ahead of the upcoming release of full fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, developments that are likely to influence its production mix, cost profile and capital allocation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (RGLD) stock is a Buy with a $277.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Royal Gold stock, see the RGLD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RGLD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RGLD is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying profitability and upbeat operating performance, supported by a clear uptrend in the technical picture. It is moderated by weak TTM free cash flow and a higher debt load tied to acquisitions, along with a valuation that looks expensive versus earnings and a modest dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on RGLD stock, click here.

More about Royal Gold

Royal Gold, Inc. is a Denver-based precious metals royalty and streaming company focused on gold, silver, copper and other metals. Rather than operating mines directly, the company finances mining projects in exchange for royalty and stream interests, giving it leveraged exposure to commodity prices and production volumes while maintaining a relatively asset-light balance sheet.

data.title: CIBC Prices US$700 Million NVCC Limited Recourse Capital Notes Series 9
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Canadian Bank of Commerce ( (TSE:CM) ) is now available.

On January 13, 2026, Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission reporting that it has entered into an underwriting agreement, dated January 6, 2026, for a US$700 million issuance of 6.500% Fixed Rate Reset Limited Recourse Capital Notes Series 9 (Non-Viability Contingent Capital) as subordinated indebtedness. The notes, issued under a subordinated indenture originally dated November 5, 2024 and a new third supplemental indenture, are backed by a limited recourse trust holding newly created Non-Cumulative 5-year Fixed Rate Reset Class A Preferred Shares Series 64, with common shares reserved for potential conversion upon a regulatory trigger event, underscoring CIBC’s ongoing use of NVCC-compliant capital instruments to support its funding and regulatory capital structure in the U.S. market.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CM) stock is a Buy with a C$138.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canadian Bank of Commerce stock, see the TSE:CM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CM is a Outperform.

The score is primarily supported by solid financial performance with strong revenue growth and healthy ROE, but capped by high leverage and weaker cash-flow conversion. Technicals are a positive contributor given the sustained uptrend and moderate momentum signals. Valuation is supportive with a reasonable P/E and a mid-single-digit dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CM stock, click here.

More about Canadian Bank of Commerce

Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CIBC) is a major Canadian bank chartered under the Bank Act (Canada), providing a broad range of banking and financial services. Listed in the United States as a foreign private issuer, it regularly raises funding in U.S. capital markets through registered offerings of senior and subordinated debt, preferred shares and other securities under a large, pre-filed shelf registration program.
